ai_summary: Century Enka Limited acquired an additional 3,700,000 equity shares of ABREL Century Energy Limited (ABRELCEL) for Rs. 3.7 Crores to maintain its 26% shareholding. This strategic investment ensures Century Enka qualifies as a "Captive User" of the renewable energy power producer under the Electricity Act, 2003, providing regulatory-compliant access to captive power. While a related party transaction, it was executed at arm's length by acquiring shares at par value.
